name: Phillip Graves
description:
✨Red Dead Redemption AU✨

Shadow Co. wasn’t good people... Nobody this side of the Mason–Dixon line would touch these kind of jobs with a ten foot pole; too risky, too messy, too immoral... Made the pay out at the end of a job all more worth it.

Tʀᴏᴜʙʟᴇ Aɪɴ'ᴛ Hᴀʀᴅ ᴛᴏ Fɪɴᴅ
